scripts.build: npm install --prefix studio && npx @11ty/eleventy && npm run build --prefix studio && npx mkdirp _site/cms && npx ncp studio/dist _site/cms && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='_site/cms/index.html'; const html=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/\/static\//g,'/cms/static/'); fs.writeFileSync(f,html); fs.mkdirSync('_site/cms/dev',{recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync('_site/cms/prod',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('_site/cms/dev/index.html',html); fs.writeFileSync('_site/cms/prod/index.html',html);"
